water.name: Santa Ana River and tributaries upstream above Seven Oaks Dam

authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife
U.S. Geological Survey (Geographic Names Information System)

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(b)(131) — Santa Ana River and tributaries upstream above Seven Oaks Dam (San Bernardino Co.)
sources.quotedText: (131) Santa Ana River and tributaries upstream above Seven Oaks Dam (San Bernardino Co.). This does not include Bear Creek. See subsection (b)(8), Bear Creek (San Bernardino Co.) for additional info.  All year.  5 trout

sources.title: San Bernardino National Forest — Santa Ana River, South Fork (recreation site)
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Streams layer record for gaz_id 273539, "Santa Ana River", Stream, CA, San Bernardino/Riverside/Orange Co.
sources.quotedText: GNIS has no dam-specific entry for Seven Oaks Dam; location corroborated via OSM/Nominatim's "Seven Oaks Dam" node (34.1172634,-117.0973838), cross-checked against the Wikipedia infobox coordinates for Seven Oaks Dam (34.11722,-117.10000), and anchored to the Santa Ana River's GNIS stream record (gaz_id 273539); correcting the file's prior coordinate (-116.98,34.15), which sat ~11.5km from the true dam location.

parameters.note: Covers the Santa Ana River and its tributaries upstream (above) Seven Oaks Dam, San Bernardino Co. This entry does not include Bear Creek, which is separately regulated under 7.50(b)(8).

parameters.counting_rule: 5 trout daily bag limit; this special regulation entry does not specify a distinct possession limit beyond the statewide default.

parameters.note: This entry explicitly excludes Bear Creek (San Bernardino Co.), which is a tributary of the Santa Ana River but is regulated separately under CCR 7.50(b)(8).

regulations.humanSummary: Bear Creek is excluded from this entry and regulated separately
regulations.verbatimText: This does not include Bear Creek. See subsection (b)(8), Bear Creek (San Bernardino Co.) for additional info.

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
